title: Astral Storage
description: A powerful astral-themed storage system capable of holding up to 10,000,000 items in one network. It allows players to store, organize, and instantly access large amounts of items through a central terminal with search and sorting features.
body:
# 🌌 Astral Storage

**The ultimate storage solution.** Tired of building massive, laggy rooms filled with hundreds of chests? Astral Storage adds a single, magical, highly advanced storage block to Minecraft capable of holding up to **10,000,000 items**. Designed for players, hoarders, and massive automation networks, this mod provides a sleek, lag-friendly way to store your entire world's worth of blocks in one place.


## ✨ Key Features

* **Massive Capacity:** Store up to 10,000,000 items inside a single block.
* **Deep-Search Bar:** Never lose an item again. The built-in search bar doesn't just search item names—it reads the tooltips! You can search for specific enchantments (e.g., "Protection IV"), potion effects, or custom lore to instantly highlight exactly what you need.
* **Portable (Shulker Box Mechanics):** Moving bases? No problem. When you break the Astral Chest, it keeps all 10 million items safely stored inside. Just pick it up, carry it with you, and place it back down.
* **Custom 3D Model & Audio:** Features a beautiful, custom 3D model that automatically rotates to face you when placed, complete with a unique magical sound effect when opened.
* **Sleek Custom UI:** A highly polished, custom-scrolling interface with a dark astral theme that looks great and runs smoothly.

## 🛠️ Crafting Recipe

Because the Astral Chest is incredibly powerful, it requires some rare materials to craft.

You will need the following items in a Crafting Table:
* **Top Row:** Amethyst Shard | Netherite Ingot | Amethyst Shard
* **Middle Row:** Ghast Tear | Chest | Ghast Tear
* **Bottom Row:** Blaze Powder | Heart of the Sea | Blaze Powder

## ⚙️ Requirements
* **Modloader:** Fabric
* **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1
* **Required Dependency:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (The game will crash if you do not have this installed!)

## 🐛 Issues & Feedback
If you find any bugs or have suggestions for future updates, please feel free to leave a comment or open an issue on the project's GitHub page!

---
*Created by KarmaManPy*
